title: Stamina Meter
description: Limits the player's sprinting with stamina
body:
# Stamina Meter

## About

This Datapack adds a limit to sprinting in minecraft, making avoiding enemies harder. You have a 10 second limit to sprinting, which goes back up at the same rate when you stop after one second, if you continue to sprint yourself to exhaustion you will also have to wait slightly longer to be allowed to sprint again.


<details>
<summary>Config</summary>

**Set Maximum Stamina**
scoreboard players set *max stamella.config (value)


</details>

Change the config options to edit the datapack
scoreboard players set *max stamella.config 100 - Sets maximum stamina to 100 ticks (5 seconds of runtime)

## Credits

Inspiration - Zaluuk
